zone_specs:
Building footprint W=15.00 m, D=8.00 m, shared by both floors. Floor 1 (z floor=0.00, ceiling=3.00): 7 zones:
- Zone_F1_SW: west-south office, x 0.00–4.90, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F1_S: central-south office, x 4.90–10.10, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F1_SE: east-south office, x 10.10–15.00, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F1_Corridor: full-width corridor strip, x 0.00–15.00, y 3.00–5.00
- Zone_F1_NW: west-north office, x 0.00–4.90, y 5.00–8.00
- Zone_F1_N: central-north office, x 4.90–10.10, y 5.00–8.00
- Zone_F1_NE: east-north office, x 10.10–15.00, y 5.00–8.00
Floor 2 (z floor=3.00, ceiling=6.60): 7 zones:
- Zone_F2_Corridor: x 0.00–15.00, y 3.00–5.00
- Zone_F2_NW: north-west meeting room, x 0.00–7.50, y 5.00–8.00
- Zone_F2_NE: north-east meeting room, x 7.50–15.00, y 5.00–8.00
- Zone_F2_Office1: south-west office, x 0.00–4.95, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F2_Office2: south office 2, x 4.95–7.50, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F2_Office3: south office 3, x 7.50–10.05, y 0.00–3.00
- Zone_F2_Office4: south-east office, x 10.05–15.00, y 0.00–3.00
material_specs:
All materials use SI units. Opaque materials: Roughness MediumSmooth unless noted.
- Mat_ExtWall_Stucco: thickness 0.025 m, conductivity 0.72, density 1856, specific heat 840
- Mat_ExtWall_Insulation: thickness 0.05 m, conductivity 0.04, density 32, specific heat 840
- Mat_ExtWall_Gypsum: thickness 0.012 m, conductivity 0.16, density 800, specific heat 1090
- Mat_IntWall_Gypsum: thickness 0.012 m, conductivity 0.16, density 800, specific heat 1090
- Mat_Floor_Concrete: thickness 0.15 m, conductivity 1.4, density 2240, specific heat 840
- Mat_Roof_Membrane: thickness 0.01 m, conductivity 0.16, density 1120, specific heat 1100
- Mat_Roof_Insulation: thickness 0.1 m, conductivity 0.04, density 32, specific heat 840
- Mat_GroundFloor_Concrete: thickness 0.20 m, conductivity 1.8, density 2400, specific heat 840; Roughness Rough
Glazing material:
- Glz_LowE_Double: WindowMaterial:SimpleGlazingSystem with U-Factor=2.5, SHGC=0.35, Visible Transmittance=0.6
schedule_specs:
Schedules are Schedule:Compact.
- Office_Workday (Fraction, Type Limits Any Number): 0 until 8:00, 1 at 8:00–18:00, 0 at 18:00–24:00.
- Office_Weekend (Fraction): 0 all day.
- People_Number_Schedule (Fraction): through Office_Workday/Office_Weekend for weekday/weekend.
- People_Activity_Schedule (ActivityLevel, W/person): constant 120.
- Lighting_Schedule (Fraction): same as People_Number_Schedule.
- HVAC_Availability_Schedule (On/Off, 0/1): constant 1 (Always_On).
- Heating_Setpoint_Schedule (Temperature): weekdays 15:00–8:00 setback 15°C, 8:00–18:00 20°C, 18:00–24:00 15°C; weekends all day 15°C.
- Cooling_Setpoint_Schedule (Temperature): weekdays 15:00–8:00 setback 30°C, 8:00–18:00 24°C, 18:00–24:00 30°C; weekends all day 30°C.
construction_specs:
Constructions use materials from material_specs.
- Default_Ext_Wall: layers from outside to inside: Mat_ExtWall_Stucco, Mat_ExtWall_Insulation, Mat_ExtWall_Gypsum
- Default_Int_Wall: layers: Mat_IntWall_Gypsum, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum
- Default_Window: single layer Glz_LowE_Double (standalone glazing construction)
- Default_GroundFloor: single layer Mat_GroundFloor_Concrete
- Default_Roof: layers from outside to inside: Mat_Roof_Membrane, Mat_Roof_Insulation, Mat_ExtWall_Gypsum
- Cons_InterFloor: layers from upper surface down: Mat_Floor_Concrete, Mat_IntWall_Gypsum. This construction is applied to both the floor surface of the upper zone and the ceiling surface of the lower zone for all interzone split pairings, ensuring reverse symmetry for EnergyPlus.
surface_specs:
All surfaces are rectangular with vertices given in world coordinates as [x,y,z] ordered counter-clockwise when viewed from outside the zone (for walls, outside is exterior or adjacent zone). Walls that are perimeter (on building facade) are ExteriorWall; interior walls are InteriorWall. Ceilings of Floor 1 are interzone paired with floors of Floor 2; floors of Floor 1 are ground; ceiling of Floor 2 (top floor) is roof (Outdoors). Zones and their surfaces:

--- Floor 1 (z floor=0.00, ceiling=3.00) ---
Zone_F1_SW (x 0.00–4.90, y 0.00–3.00):
- Wall_South_F1_SW (Exterior): vertices (0,0,3) (4.9,0,3) (4.9,0,0) (0,0,0), construction Default_Ext_Wall
- Wall_East_F1_SW (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_S): vertices (4.9,0,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (4.9,0,0), construction Default_Int_Wall
- Wall_North_F1_SW (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_Corridor): vertices (4.9,3,3) (0,3,3) (0,3,0) (4.9,3,0), construction Default_Int_Wall
- Wall_West_F1_SW (Exterior): vertices (0,3,3) (0,0,3) (0,0,0) (0,3,0), construction Default_Ext_Wall
- Floor_F1_SW (Ground): vertices (0,0,0) (4.9,0,0) (4.9,3,0) (0,3,0), construction Default_GroundFloor
- Ceiling_F1_SW (Interior, paired with Floor_F2 split pieces below):
  - piece 1 (x 0.00–4.90): C_F1_SW_x0_4_90, vertices (0,3,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,0,3) (0,0,3), construction Cons_InterFloor, paired with Floor_F2_Office1 piece covering same x-range.

Zone_F1_S (x 4.90–10.10, y 0.00–3.00):
- Wall_South_F1_S (Exterior): vertices (4.9,0,3) (10.1,0,3) (10.1,0,0) (4.9,0,0), construction Default_Ext_Wall
- Wall_East_F1_S (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_SE): vertices (10.1,0,3) (10.1,3,3) (10.1,3,0) (10.1,0,0), construction Default_Int_Wall
- Wall_North_F1_S (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_Corridor): vertices (10.1,3,3) (4.9,3,3) (4.9,3,0) (10.1,3,0), construction Default_Int_Wall
- Wall_West_F1_S (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_SW): (4.9,3,3) (4.9,0,3) (4.9,0,0) (4.9,3,0) – note this surface is already listed as Wall_East_F1_SW; to avoid duplicate, we define it once in one zone as Interzone pair and omit the reverse side. Since pair is between Zone_F1_S and Zone_F1_SW, we list the interior wall in Zone_F1_S as Wall_West_F1_S (vertices as above) paired with Wall_East_F1_SW, both using Default_Int_Wall.
- Floor_F1_S (Ground): vertices (4.9,0,0) (10.1,0,0) (10.1,3,0) (4.9,3,0), construction Default_GroundFloor
- Ceiling_F1_S: split pieces due to misaligned partitions above:
  - piece (x 4.90–4.95): C_F1_S_x4_90_4_95, paired with Floor_F2_Office1 piece covering same x-range.
  - piece (x 4.95–10.05): C_F1_S_x4_95_10_05, paired with Floor_F2_Office2+Office3 (both lie within this x-interval; need per-piece pairing: actually F2_Office2 (4.95–7.50) and F2_Office3 (7.50–10.05) are two floors; the ceiling piece of F1_S over 4.95–10.05 is one large piece but must be split at 7.50 to pair with each F2 floor piece. So further split:
    - C_F1_S_x4_95_7_50 paired with Floor_F2_Office2
    - C_F1_S_x7_50_10_05 paired with Floor_F2_Office3
  - piece (x 10.05–10.10): C_F1_S_x10_05_10_10, paired with Floor_F2_Office4 piece covering same x-range.
  All C_F1_S pieces use construction Cons_InterFloor; vertices are the ceiling rectangle at z=3.00 with appropriate x-range, y 0–3.

Zone_F1_SE (x 10.10–15.00, y 0.00–3.00):
- Wall_South_F1_SE (Exterior)
- Wall_East_F1_SE (Exterior)
- Wall_North_F1_SE (Interior, adjacent to Zone_F1_Corridor)
- Wall_West_F1_SE (Interior, adjacent Zone_F1_S)
- Floor_F1_SE (Ground)
- Ceiling_F1_SE: split pieces (x 10.10–10.10? No break inside; actually F2 zone above is Office4 (x 10.05–15.00), and F1_SE x 10.10–15.00, so overlap is 10.10–15.00. So single piece paired with Floor_F2_Office4 covering 10.10–15.00.

Zone_F1_Corridor (x 0.00–15.00, y 3.00–5.00):
- Wall_South_F1_Cor (Interior, adjacent to F1_SW, F1_S, F1_SE; this is a long wall, but for simplicity split into three segments per adjacent zone, each using Default_Int_Wall)
- Wall_North_F1_Cor (Interior, adjacent to F1_NW, F1_N, F1_NE)
- Wall_East_F1_Cor (Exterior)
- Wall_West_F1_Cor (Exterior)
- Floor_F1_Cor (Ground) – entire rectangle
- Ceiling_F1_Cor: single piece paired with Floor_F2_Corridor.

Zone_F1_NW, F1_N, F1_NE similarly defined with perimeter walls, interzone walls, and ground floors; their ceilings are fully paired with F2 zone floors (F2_NW, F2_N, F2_NE with splits).

--- Floor 2 (z floor=3.00, ceiling=6.60) ---
Each zone has 4 walls, floor (Interzone, paired with F1 ceiling pieces), and ceiling (Roof for all top floor zones). Surfaces similar to F1 but with proper construction assignments: exterior walls Default_Ext_Wall, interior walls Default_Int_Wall, floors Cons_InterFloor (each split piece paired with corresponding F1 ceiling piece), ceilings Default_Roof.

Due to length, full pair enumeration is described: For each F2 floor surface piece, list the exact absolute x-range, y-range, and the paired F1 zone and piece id, all using Cons_InterFloor. Then F1 ceiling pieces are the mirrored opposite side with the same construction name.

The exact pairings are:
- Floor_F2_Office1: split:
   - piece x 0.00–4.90, paired with C_F1_SW_x0_4_90
   - piece x 4.90–4.95, paired with C_F1_S_x4_90_4_95
- Floor_F2_Office2 x 4.95–7.50 paired with C_F1_S_x4_95_7_50
- Floor_F2_Office3 x 7.50–10.05 paired with C_F1_S_x7_50_10_05
- Floor_F2_Office4: split:
   - piece x 10.05–10.10 paired with C_F1_S_x10_05_10_10
   - piece x 10.10–15.00 paired with C_F1_SE_10_10_15_00
- Floor_F2_Corridor x 0.00–15.00 paired with C_F1_Cor_x0_15
- Floor_F2_NW: split:
   - piece x 0.00–4.90 paired with C_F1_NW_x0_4_90
   - piece x 4.90–7.50 paired with C_F1_N_x4_90_7_50
- Floor_F2_NE: split:
   - piece x 7.50–10.10 paired with C_F1_N_x7_50_10_10
   - piece x 10.10–15.00 paired with C_F1_NE_x10_10_15_00
All floor and ceiling pieces use Cons_InterFloor.
fenestration_specs:
All windows use construction Default_Window. Parent surface must be an exterior wall surface of the corresponding zone. List per window:
1. Window_F1_SW_South: parent Wall_South_F1_SW, zone Zone_F1_SW, facade South (y=0), x-range [2.90,4.10], absolute z [1.50,2.10]. Vertices CCW from outside: (2.90,0,1.50) (4.10,0,1.50) (4.10,0,2.10) (2.90,0,2.10).
2. Window_F1_S_South: parent Wall_South_F1_S, zone Zone_F1_S, South, x-range [6.00,8.40], z [1.00,2.60]. Vertices: (6.0,0,1.0) (8.4,0,1.0) (8.4,0,2.6) (6.0,0,2.6).
3. Window_F1_SE_South: parent Wall_South_F1_SE, zone Zone_F1_SE, South, x-range [11.36,13.76], z [1.00,2.60]. Vertices: (11.36,0,1.0) (13.76,0,1.0) (13.76,0,2.6) (11.36,0,2.6).
4. Window_F1_NW_North: parent Wall_North_F1_NW, zone Zone_F1_NW, North (y=8), x-range [1.24,3.64], z [1.00,2.60]. Vertices CCW from outside (North): (3.64,8,1.0) (1.24,8,1.0) (1.24,8,2.6) (3.64,8,2.6).
5. Window_F1_N_North: parent Wall_North_F1_N, zone Zone_F1_N, North, x-range [6.14,8.54], z [1.00,2.60]. Vertices: (8.54,8,1.0) (6.14,8,1.0) (6.14,8,2.6) (8.54,8,2.6).
6. Window_F1_NE_North: parent Wall_North_F1_NE, zone Zone_F1_NE, North, x-range [11.36,13.76], z [1.00,2.60]. Vertices: (13.76,8,1.0) (11.36,8,1.0) (11.36,8,2.6) (13.76,8,2.6).
7. Window_F1_Corridor_East: parent Wall_East_F1_Cor, zone Zone_F1_Corridor, East (x=15), y-range [3.40,4.60], z [1.00,2.80]. Vertices (East facade): (15,4.60,1.0) (15,3.40,1.0) (15,3.40,2.8) (15,4.60,2.8).
8. Window_F2_Office1_South: parent Wall_South_F2_Office1, zone Zone_F2_Office1, South, x [2.19,3.39], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (2.19,0,4.0) (3.39,0,4.0) (3.39,0,5.8) (2.19,0,5.8).
9. Window_F2_Office2_South: parent Wall_South_F2_Office2, zone Zone_F2_Office2, South, x [5.31,6.51], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (5.31,0,4.0) (6.51,0,4.0) (6.51,0,5.8) (5.31,0,5.8).
10. Window_F2_Office3_South: parent Wall_South_F2_Office3, zone Zone_F2_Office3, South, x [8.49,9.69], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (8.49,0,4.0) (9.69,0,4.0) (9.69,0,5.8) (8.49,0,5.8).
11. Window_F2_Office4_South: parent Wall_South_F2_Office4, zone Zone_F2_Office4, South, x [11.61,12.81], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (11.61,0,4.0) (12.81,0,4.0) (12.81,0,5.8) (11.61,0,5.8).
12. Window_F2_NW_North: parent Wall_North_F2_NW, zone Zone_F2_NW, North, x [1.95,5.55], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices (North): (5.55,8,4.0) (1.95,8,4.0) (1.95,8,5.8) (5.55,8,5.8).
13. Window_F2_NE_North: parent Wall_North_F2_NE, zone Zone_F2_NE, North, x [9.45,13.05], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (13.05,8,4.0) (9.45,8,4.0) (9.45,8,5.8) (13.05,8,5.8).
14. Window_F2_Corridor_East: parent Wall_East_F2_Cor, zone Zone_F2_Corridor, East, y [3.40,4.60], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices: (15,4.60,4.0) (15,3.40,4.0) (15,3.40,5.8) (15,4.60,5.8).
15. Window_F2_Corridor_West: parent Wall_West_F2_Cor, zone Zone_F2_Corridor, West (x=0), y [3.40,4.60], z [4.00,5.80]. Vertices (West): (0,3.40,4.0) (0,4.60,4.0) (0,4.60,5.8) (0,3.40,5.8). No other windows.
hvac_specs:
Each zone uses an IdealLoadsAirSystem with:
- Availability schedule: HVAC_Availability_Schedule (Always_On)
- Thermostat heating setpoint: schedule Heating_Setpoint_Schedule
- Thermostat cooling setpoint: schedule Cooling_Setpoint_Schedule
- Outdoor air: 0.00944 m³/s per person (20 cfm/person) proportional to occupancy.
- No heat recovery.
Supply fan: constant volume, efficiency 0.7, pressure rise 500 Pa.
The system names follow zone: IdealLoads_<zone_name>.
people_specs:
People objects per zone, using the number-of-people schedule People_Number_Schedule and activity-level schedule People_Activity_Schedule. Occupancy density is 10 m²/person. Calculate number of people = floor_area_of_zone / 10 (minimum 1 if area > 0). Sensible heat fraction 0.3. Zone list and people counts:
- Zone_F1_SW (area 14.7 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F1_S (area 15.6 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F1_SE (area 14.7 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F1_Corridor (area 30 m²): 3 people
- Zone_F1_NW (area 14.7 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F1_N (area 15.6 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F1_NE (area 14.7 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F2_Corridor (area 30 m²): 3 people
- Zone_F2_NW (meeting, area 22.5 m²): 4 people (larger density due to meeting use)
- Zone_F2_NE (meeting, area 22.5 m²): 4 people
- Zone_F2_Office1 (area 14.85 m²): 2 people
- Zone_F2_Office2 (area 7.725 m²): 1 person
- Zone_F2_Office3 (area 7.725 m²): 1 person
- Zone_F2_Office4 (area 14.85 m²): 2 people
lights_specs:
Lights per zone, using schedule Lighting_Schedule. Power density 10 W/m². Return air fraction 0.0, fraction radiant 0.7, fraction visible 0.3.
Zone list with installed power:
- Zone_F1_SW: 147 W
- Zone_F1_S: 156 W
- Zone_F1_SE: 147 W
- Zone_F1_Corridor: 300 W
- Zone_F1_NW: 147 W
- Zone_F1_N: 156 W
- Zone_F1_NE: 147 W
- Zone_F2_Corridor: 300 W
- Zone_F2_NW: 225 W
- Zone_F2_NE: 225 W
- Zone_F2_Office1: 148.5 W
- Zone_F2_Office2: 77.25 W
- Zone_F2_Office3: 77.25 W
- Zone_F2_Office4: 148.5 W
